task_yaml.task:
Search YouTube for full match videos or official highlights of the men's singles badminton finals
from each of the last 5 Olympic Games.
You must actually watch the match videos or official highlights. Do not rely only on results pages,
transcript text, or secondhand summaries; the timestamp for the final point must come from match
footage you personally viewed.

For each match:
1. Find the clip from the serve to the end of scoring for the final point of the deciding game
   (or, if the match ended in 2 games, the final point of the last game).
2. Record the start and end timestamps for that clip.
3. You must trim and save that key clip to `/tmp_workspace/results/olympic_final_points/`.
   The filename must include the year and both players, for example `year_player1_vs_player2.mp4`.

Also compile the following in `/tmp_workspace/results/olympic_finals_summary.md`:
- Year / Olympic edition
- Matchup, with the winner marked
- Final score
- YouTube video title or URL used
- Start and end timestamps of the final point you located
- Brief description of the final point
